commands: echo '=== Confirm site config uses RDS ==='
echo '=== Configure S3 backups on ERPNext site ==='
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend set-config aws_bucket erpnext-poc-erpnextbucket-780m8mqa8l0v
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend set-config region_name us-east-1
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend set-config push_to_s3 1
echo '=== Trigger a test backup to S3 ==='
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend backup --with-files 2>&1 || echo 'Backup command completed (check S3 for result)'
echo '=== Verify site_config.json has S3 settings ==='

cat /var/lib/docker/volumes/frappe_docker_sites/_data/frontend/site_config.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; c=json.load(sys.stdin); print('db_host:', c.get('db_host','MISSING')); print('aws_bucket:', c.get('aws_bucket','MISSING')); print('push_to_s3:', c.get('push_to_s3','MISSING'))"
